name: Higher Protein Peanut Butter Cup Smoothie
intro: Tofu adds a good portion of protein to this smoothie. I use organic sprouted firm tofu but any kind you like or have on hand will do.

ingredients.item: / 67 grams peanut butter, crunchy or smooth
/ 34 grams organic granulated sugar, whole cane sugar, or coconut sugar

method: Put all the ingredients in a blender in the order listed, except the ice, and blend until smooth and creamy. Start the blender on low and increase to high speed. Blend until all the ingredients are completely puréed. Add the ice cubes a few at a time and blend until frothy. Pour into 1 or 2 glasses and enjoy.
